cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/repo/__init__.py b/repo/__init__.py
index f6c6462..a07c31e 100644
--- a/repo/__init__.py
+++ b/repo/__init__.py
@@ -11,3 +11,6 @@ class UserRepo:
 
     def by_status(self, status):
         return self.db.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE status = ?", [status])
+
+    def by_email(self, email):
+        return self.db.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = ?", [email])

cases.name: fstring_injection
cases.diff:
diff --git a/repo/__init__.py b/repo/__init__.py
index f6c6462..c77954a 100644
--- a/repo/__init__.py
+++ b/repo/__init__.py
@@ -11,3 +11,6 @@ class UserRepo:
 
     def by_status(self, status):
         return self.db.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE status = ?", [status])
+
+    def by_email(self, email):
+        return self.db.query(f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = '{email}'", [])

cases.name: string_concat
cases.diff:
diff --git a/repo/__init__.py b/repo/__init__.py
index f6c6462..d676988 100644
--- a/repo/__init__.py
+++ b/repo/__init__.py
@@ -11,3 +11,6 @@ class UserRepo:
 
     def by_status(self, status):
         return self.db.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE status = ?", [status])
+
+    def by_email(self, email):
+        return self.db.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = '" + email + "'", [])

cases.name: wrong_column
cases.diff:
diff --git a/repo/__init__.py b/repo/__init__.py
index f6c6462..15f1dbe 100644
--- a/repo/__init__.py
+++ b/repo/__init__.py
@@ -11,3 +11,6 @@ class UserRepo:
 
     def by_status(self, status):
         return self.db.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE status = ?", [status])
+
+    def by_email(self, email):
+        return self.db.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = ?", [email])
